title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Indian Institutes of Information Technology (Public-private Partnership) Act, 2017. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 6th September, 2017 vide notification No. S.O. 2928(E) dated the 6 September, 2017, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
